primary_accounting_issue: Qualification et classification IFRS 9 d’un actif financier dont les flux contractuels sont uniquement des paiements de principal et d’intérêts

authority_resolution.selection_reason: I selected IFRS 9 as the single governing lineage because it directly governs classification and subsequent measurement of financial assets, and no higher- or lower-precedence overlapping document in the provided context competes with it.
authority_resolution.residual_uncertainty: Low uncertainty because the question squarely concerns the IFRS 9 SPPI-based classification model for financial assets.

primary_authority.reason: These paragraphs directly govern classification of financial assets based on business model and whether contractual cash flows are solely payments of principal and interest.

supporting_authority.reason: This paragraph adds the distinct fair value through profit or loss designation option for eliminating an accounting mismatch.
These paragraphs clarify how to assess whether contractual cash flows are SPPI and therefore constrain which classification approaches remain available.

peripheral_authority.reason: These agenda decisions concern the OCI election for equity instruments, which is topically related but not relevant to identifying peer approaches for an asset with principal-and-interest cash flows.
This agenda decision notes a specific dual-currency bond fact pattern but does not add necessary peer treatment models for the core issue.

treatment_families.family: Subsequent measurement of financial assets that meet the SPPI condition within a hold-to-collect business model
Subsequent measurement of financial assets that meet the SPPI condition within a hold-to-collect-and-sell business model
Residual or designated fair value measurement for financial assets, including assets not measured at amortised cost or at fair value through other comprehensive income

approaches.label: Amortised cost
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 provides amortised cost as a top-level measurement category when the asset meets SPPI and is held in a hold-to-collect business model.

approaches.label: Fair value through other comprehensive income
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 provides fair value through other comprehensive income as a top-level measurement category when the asset meets SPPI and is held in a business model achieved by collecting cash flows and selling.

approaches.label: Fair value through profit or loss
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 provides fair value through profit or loss as the residual category and also as an elective designation when that designation eliminates or significantly reduces an accounting mismatch.
